description: SupaLung, a name paying homage to late-'60s rock powerhouse Terry Reid, affectionately known as “Superlungs”, is a firecracker four-piece that’s quickly becoming essential listening for fans of live alt-indie rock who celebrate depth, joy and groove. Fronted by the hauntingly earnest vocals and sharp songwriting of Sam Brookes, and co-piloted by multi-instrumentalist and producer Pete Josef, SupaLung is not just a band, it’s a moment, a feeling, a sonic hug with the heart of a drum that kicks.
title: SupaLung Concert
